who: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee timesheets/week
offer: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee timesheets/week, unmonitored overtime causes budget overruns. We alert HR ops when overtime thresholds are exceeded instead of manual tracking of timesheets and overtime calculations.
problem: Overtime management leading to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where HR managers seek advice
Share insights on Indie Hackers about overtime issues
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums discussing HR tools
try_it: Let users try real-time alerts and manual entry features
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Template common inputs for quick entry
Allow CSV import for user data
